title: Configuration for issue type color mapping
description: Define project-config-driven color mapping for issue types so Taskulus list output colors can be customized per project. Align Python and Rust implementations, add config schema and tests.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: 1) Agreed config shape for type->color map. 2) Python+Rust list formatting reads colors from config. 3) Tests validating colors applied and porcelain stays uncolored.
